name: Plan request
about: Ask for a planning-as-code implementation plan
title: "[plan] "
labels: plan

<!--
Adding the `plan` label triggers the Planning as Code workflow, which drafts a
structured implementation plan and opens it as a pull request for review.
See docs/planning-as-code.md for details.
-->

## What do you want to build or change?

<!-- Describe the task. The more concrete, the better the plan. -->

     avoid, deadlines, etc. -->
